line: Notion collision audit: Claude routines may have written shared Notion locations between Friday and Sunday; verify live page state before treating repo caches as current.
honesty_rule: Live Notion verification wins over local cache assumptions.

rows.check: Search/fetch live page rows before resolving or de-duping signal rows.
Fetch live queue item before marking a dossier/status as current.
Verify latest live status before trusting repo-side weekly pilot cache.
Prefer latest full-body Gmail evidence and live Notion state over stale local rows.
